summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-1 is addressed in AuthContext.tsx with localStorage-based session initialization and persistence. REQ-2 is addressed in Layout.tsx with adminLogout/customerLogout calls plus onLogout navigation callback, and in App.tsx with a useEffect that detects isAuthenticated becoming false and redirects to login-selection. REQ-3 is addressed in ServiceForm.tsx by reading customerSession.mobile as customerId and guarding against missing sessions. All acceptance criteria appear to be met. The backend migration.mo file is a minor addition removing nextDocumentId, which is consistent with the Motoko-only constraint. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were detected.
